headline: Analog Devices (ADI) Is Up 5.6% After Analyst Upgrades Ahead Of Earnings - What's Changed
summary: Analog Devices has recently outperformed the broader market ahead of its 20 May 2026 earnings release, as analysts expect higher earnings per share and revenue than a year ago and have raised their forecasts accordingly. At the same time, CEO Vincent Roche exercised 10,000 stock options and sold 10,000 shares under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 plan, a move that contrasts with the generally upbeat analyst view of the company’s business outlook. We’ll explore how rising analyst optimism about...
